notes: Authoritative bundleHash test vectors for the example manifests in this directory. These values are the oracle: any conformant SecureFusion v1 implementation MUST hash the canonical bytes of each example to the matching bundleHash. The hashes were computed deterministically by the schema dev's compute-vectors.mjs script (see _team/compute-vectors.mjs) and the C# sample in samples/csharp prints the same values when run with the deterministic test seed. Keep this file in sync with the on-disk examples — every PR that touches an examples/*.json must update the matching bundleHash here in the same commit.
